trait.confidence_notes: GWAS is sex-combined; dosage-compensation assumptions are not explicit. eQTL follow-up completed for rsID-addressable loci; some loci lacked a usable rsID.
trait.eqtl_lookup_note: eQTL follow-up completed for rsID-addressable loci; some loci lacked a usable rsID.
trait.category: UK Biobank Assessment Centre > Touchscreen > Sex-specific factors > Female-specific factors
trait.description_more: ACE touchscreen question "How old were you when your periods started?" The following checks were performed:  If answer   If answer > Participants age then rejected  If answer > 25 then rejected  If answer   If answer > 20 then participant asked to confirm   If the participant activated the Help button they were shown the message:     If you are unsure, please provide an estimate or select Do not know.
